items.title: AI scammers target missing man's parents with chilling extortion attempt

children.content: Extortionists have sent the parents of a missing West Australian man an AI-generated image of their son and demanded thousands of dollars in exchange for his safety.

items.title: AFL heavyweights Fremantle, Sydney primed for showdown

image.altText: Luke Jackson celebrates an AFL goal with a Dockers teammate.

children.content: Fremantle take on Sydney at Perth Stadium on Thursday night, in a match boasting storylines as compelling as early-era Melrose Place. Who will emerge from the clash as premiership favourites?

items.title: Police call for help to handle 'disgusting' Facebook comments

children.content: The WA Police commissioner writes to Meta to ask for assistance with Facebook moderation after a number of derogatory comments are left on social media pages.

image.altText: A medium close-up shot of WA Police Commissioner Col Blanch in uniform.

items.title: Foreign investor snub of divestment order 'extraordinary', says expert

children.content: China-linked investors in a Western Australia rare earths company have yet to comply with federal Treasurer Jim Chalmers's latest order to sell their shares.

items.title: Millions of tiny engineers help to restore health of marine ecosystem in WA

children.content: A restorative mussel farm could improve water quality and biodiversity in Cockburn Sound and the project leaders say there's no need to stop there.

items.title: BHP workers to strike as negotiations with mining giant stall

items.title: SA confirms second H5 bird flu case, two more suspected in Perth and WA

items.title: Reform demanded after Telstra becomes latest telco to suffer outage

children.content: Advocates have demanded changes to how telecommunication companies are regulated and held accountable for outages after Telstra became the latest telco to suffer a large-scale network failure.

articles.title: Telstra investigating secondary network fault affecting Triple Zero

children.content: Telstra is investigating a secondary network fault affecting Triple Zero callers since yesterday's outage. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.

articles.title: Here's how the Telstra outage impacted these Australians

items.title: Ban on ancient 'superfood' divides growers and regulators

children.content: Farmers are appealing against a federal ban on the sale of
Moringa oleifera
as a food after a regulatory body determined there was insufficient evidence to prove its safety.

items.title: Cost-of-living crisis 'hits from two directions' as major musicals close

items.title: The 'amazing' turnaround in literacy at this primary school

children.content: An inspiring turnaround at an Aboriginal community school just outside Bunbury in south-west WA could provide a scalable solution for closing the gap on Indigenous literacy.
